title: conyza retusa
intro: Conyza retusa, also known as bitter buttons or hairy fleabane, is a perennial herbaceous plant belonging to the daisy family (Asteraceae). The plant is traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. Conyza retusa has been found to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, and exhibiting antimicrobial properties that aid in wound healing. The plant can be used in herbal preparations like teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed orally or applied topically to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
